description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in layered, fantasy-inspired urban attire. He wears a short, fitted jacket with prominent shoulder pads and decorative fastenings over a long-sleeved shirt. His shorts are knee-length and feature intricate paneling and reinforced sections, paired with tall, armored boots that have multiple straps and buckles. The figure's hands are exposed, and his stance is relaxed with arms slightly outstretched. His hair is medium-length, tousled, and covers part of his forehead, giving him a youthful, adventurous appearance.
description: A stylized adult male in layered, fantasy-inspired urban clothing with a short jacket, knee-length shorts, and tall armored boots. He has medium-length tousled hair and a relaxed, upright stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed jacket, shirt, shorts, and boots, with facial features and hair visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the jacket, arm, and layered boots, with hair partially covering the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket with decorative patterns, the back of the shorts, and the boots' structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the clothing and boots, with hair obscuring part of the face.
attribute_clothing_type: layered fantasy-inspired urban outfit with a short jacket, long-sleeved shirt, knee-length shorts, and tall armored boots
